# checklist.md — verification steps

- [ ] All acceptance criteria from spec.md pass
- [ ] No new ESLint/ruff warnings
- [ ] Tests written + passing
- [ ] No secrets in commit
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated by docs daemon
- [ ] Reviewer approved
- [ ] Security pass clean (or non-blocker only)
- [ ] Perf pass clean
- [ ] No cross-project breakage in integration tests
